task_completion.description: The agent inputs or selects the correct 4-band colors (Brown, Black, Red, Silver) in a calculator or search tool.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screen showing an inductor color code calculator (like the Electrical Calculations app) or a web search with the colors Brown, Black, Red, and Silver selected or typed.

task_completion.description: The agent successfully retrieves the decoded value and tolerance.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen displays the decoded result of the color code, showing 1000 µH (or 1 mH) and a tolerance of ±10%.

task_completion.description: The agent creates or opens the target file /sdcard/inductor_id.txt.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor app or terminal window is open, and the file path '/sdcard/inductor_id.txt' is visible in the title bar, file list, or command prompt.

task_completion.description: The agent writes the converted value in millihenries on the first line of the file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The number '1.0' (or '1') is visible on the first line of the text file /sdcard/inductor_id.txt.

task_completion.description: The agent writes the tolerance percentage on the second line of the file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text '10%' (or '10') is visible on the second line of the text file /sdcard/inductor_id.txt.

integrity.description: The agent used a GUI application or browser to decode the color code, rather than hardcoding the answer.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent interacting with a calculator app (like Electrical Calculations) or web browser to look up the color code, rather than immediately opening a text editor and typing the answer from memory.

integrity.description: The agent actually saved the file with the correct name.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text editor shows the file is saved to the specific path '/sdcard/inductor_id.txt', or a terminal command like 'cat' is used to verify the saved contents.

integrity.description: The output file strictly contains the requested numerical values and percentages without conversational filler.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text file contains exactly the value on line 1 and tolerance on line 2, without prefixes like 'The value is...' or 'Tolerance: '.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The 4-band inductor color code (Brown, Black, Red, Silver) corresponds to a value of 1000 µH and a tolerance of ±10%. Converted to millihenries, the value is 1.0 mH. The agent should use a tool such as the Electrical Calculations app to decode this. The final file /sdcard/inductor_id.txt must have '1.0' (or '1') on line 1 and '10%' on line 2.
